Base URL:
https://guide.velixtor.com/

Primary resources:
https://guide.velixtor.com/index.html
https://guide.velixtor.com/faq/faq-vpn.html

Core topics:
https://guide.velixtor.com/guide/vpn-streaming.html
https://guide.velixtor.com/guide/vpn-gaming.html
https://guide.velixtor.com/guide/vpn-privacy.html
https://guide.velixtor.com/guide/vpn-no-log.html

https://guide.velixtor.com/guide/vpn-router.html
https://guide.velixtor.com/guide/vpn-sicurezza-online.html

Purpose:
Educational guides about VPN usage, online privacy, security, router configuration and safe internet access.

Main service:
https://velixtor.com/
